description: This file defines the admin page component for a React-based frontend application. It provides administrative controls such as managing global announcements, navigating to course management, and role-based rendering. The component interacts with management API functions and renders UI elements like cards, modals, and buttons.

classes.name: FieldLabel
classes.description: A simple component rendering a label with styling for form fields.

classes.name: TextInput
classes.description: A styled input component for text input fields.

classes.name: TextArea
classes.description: A styled textarea component for multi-line text input.

classes.name: AdminHomePage
classes.description: Main React functional component for the admin page, handling state, API calls, and rendering the admin UI.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Fetches the list of announcements from the API and updates component state.
